prompt_text: Rippling vs BambooHR pricing and features
response:
# Rippling vs BambooHR: Pricing & Features Comparison

## Pricing Structure

| Aspect | Rippling | BambooHR |
|--------|----------|----------|
| **Model** | Per-employee/month | Per-employee/month |
| **Base Cost** | $8-15/employee/month | $6-13/employee/month |
| **Typical Range** | $100-500+/month | $99-500+/month |
| **Modules** | All-in-one platform | Core + add-ons |
| **Custom Pricing** | Yes (enterprise) | Yes (enterprise) |

---

## Core Features Comparison

### **Rippling** (All-In-One Focus)
✅ HRIS, Payroll, Benefits, IT Management  
✅ Device management (laptops, phones)  
✅ Integrated SSO & security  
✅ Expense management  
✅ More expensive for HRIS-only needs  
✅ Better for tech-heavy companies

### **BambooHR** (HRIS-Focused)
✅ Core HR & talent management  
✅ Applicant tracking (ATS)  
✅ Performance management  
✅ Time & attendance  
✅ More affordable entry-level  
✅ Better for smaller companies

---

## Key Differences

| Feature | Rippling | BambooHR |
|---------|----------|----------|
| Payroll | Built-in | Integration only |
| IT/Device Mgmt | Yes | No |
| ATS | No | Yes |
| Benefits Admin | Built-in | Integration only |
| Ease of Setup | Moderate | Easy |
| Best For | Mid-size + tech | Small-medium |

---

## Bottom Line

- **Choose Rippling** if you want an integrated platform handling HR, IT, and payroll
- **Choose BambooHR** if you need affordable, user-friendly HRIS with room to add tools

What's your company size or primary need?
